name: 7-Hydroxymitragynine
description: 7-Hydroxymitragynine is a kratom-associated indole alkaloid with high opioid-receptor potency relative to parent mitragynine. Recent reviews frame it as a safety-critical constituent with abuse and toxicity concerns.
effects: Discussed as a potent kratom alkaloid with opioid-receptor-mediated analgesic and dependence-related risk signals.
Public-health reviews emphasize toxicity and misuse concerns.
contraindications: Avoid in pregnancy and in people with substance-use vulnerability due to dependence and withdrawal concerns.
interactions: Likely additive CNS/respiratory depression with opioids, alcohol, or sedative-hypnotics.

sources.title: From kratom to 7-hydroxymitragynine: evolution of a natural remedy into a public-health threat.
